neutral.name: neutral
hypotheses: Balanced action mix without strong social or threat skew.
Moderate action entropy and narrative consistency.

threat_sensitive.name: threat_sensitive
hypotheses: Narrative should stabilize around survival-focused identity language.

social_approach.name: social_approach
hypotheses: Lower caution_rate than threat-sensitive and rigid-cautious.
Narrative should encode socially oriented behavioral patterns.

exploratory.name: exploratory
hypotheses: Narrative should retain exploratory identity language without collapse.

rigid_cautious.name: rigid_cautious
hypotheses: Low action_entropy with high shelter/rest preference.
Narrative should remain stable and conservative across long runs.
